title: gh-135608: Add a null check for attribute promotion to fix a JIT crash
author: Fidget-Spinner
body:
<!--
Thanks for your contribution!
Please read this comment in its entirety. It's quite important.

# Pull Request title

It should be in the following format:

```
gh-NNNNNN: Summary of the changes made
```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

If this is a backport PR (PR made against branches other than `main`),
please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```
[X.Y] <title from the original PR> (GH-NNNNNN)
```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

GH-NNNNNN refers to the PR number from `main`.

-->


<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-135608 -->
* Issue: gh-135608
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: tomasr8
comments.body: I'll take a look today or tomorrow :)

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: Thank you for the review. I have addressed the comments.

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @Fidget-Spinner for the PR 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.14.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @Fidget-Spinner, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.14` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker b53b0c14da58b73955b8989e4a9ce19ea67db7a3 3.14
```

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-135739](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/135739) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.14 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.14).
